summary: Use `from app.utils.time import utc_now, to_utc_naive` for any naive-UTC datetime need: `utc_now()` replaces `datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None)`, `to_utc_naive(dt)` replaces `.astimezone(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None)`. Column defaults use the callable ref (`default=utc_now`), inline expressions call it (`utc_now()`).
